local b64 = ""
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
b64 = b64 .. [[]]
print("Base64 长度:", #b64)
-- 以下为解码和执行逻辑
local function decode_base64(data)
    data = data:gsub("%s+", "")
    local chars = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/'
    local result = {}
    for i = 1, #data, 4 do
        local a, b, c, d = string.byte(data, i, i+3)
        local n = (chars:find(string.char(a), 1, true) - 1) * 0x10000
        if b then n = n + (chars:find(string.char(b), 1, true) - 1) * 0x100 end
        if c then n = n + (chars:find(string.char(c), 1, true) - 1) * 0x4 end
        if d then n = n + (chars:find(string.char(d), 1, true) - 1) end
        result[#result+1] = string.char(bit32.rshift(n, 16), bit32.band(bit32.rshift(n,8),0xFF), bit32.band(n,0xFF))
    end
    return table.concat(result)
end

local code = decode_base64(b64)
print("解码成功，长度:", #code)

-- Hook loadstring
local old_loadstring = loadstring
loadstring = function(s, ...)
    if s and type(s)=="string" and #s>100 then
        print("[HOOK] 捕获载荷，长度:", #s)
        local f=io.open("/sdcard/final_payload.lua","w")
        if f then f:write(s) f:close() print("保存到 /sdcard/final_payload.lua") end
        pcall(setclipboard, s)
    end
    return old_loadstring(s, ...)
end

local fn, err = loadstring(code)
if fn then
    print("加载成功，执行引导器...")
    local ok, err = pcall(fn)
    if not ok then print("执行错误:", err) end
else
    print("loadstring 失败:", err)
end
